features.name: chained comparison with boolean result and single bit
features.description: Code should include a chained comparison where the result of a relational comparison (producing a 1-bit boolean) is compared to a single bit of a wider signal

features.name: dynamic shift amount from wire derived from comparison
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount is a wire derived from a comparison expression

features.name: unsigned conversion of shift result in conditional
features.description: Code should include an if condition that uses $unsigned() conversion on a right shift expression result
